goal: Fix and rebalance DaShi progression so the DaShi victory path is reachable and logically consistent with battle phase settlement.
constraints: Do not remove existing battle framework or UI architecture.
Keep the DaShi victory threshold and core battle loop stable unless needed for consistency.
Unify resource semantics: DaShi as cumulative win resource, ZhengLi as tactical/round-scale value.
deliverables: Center lane reward contributes to DaShi progression instead of transient ZhengLi-only accumulation.
Remove conflicting win-termination logic that bypasses main winner settlement path.
Battle logs and lane descriptions align with updated resource semantics.
